## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for any changed helper logic
- [ ] Acceptance tests added/updated for any changed resource/data source
- [ ] `make docs` run if a schema (description, attribute, resource/data source) changed
- [ ] `make fmt lint test` pass locally
- [ ] Changelog fragment added at `.changelog/<this PR's number>.txt` — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#changelog-fragments)
      (don't know the number yet? push it in a follow-up commit once the PR is open)
  - [ ] ...or this PR has no user-facing effect and I've applied/requested the `skip-changelog` label instead
